title: Skeleton Rebellion Collection
description: A bold series of 16 edgy skeleton illustrations featuring attitude, cigars, and street style aesthetics.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Green Smoke Attitude
images.description: A skeleton in a torn black hoodie with red eyes, smoking a cigar with green mystical smoke and flipping the bird.

images.title: Crossbones Cigar Skeleton
images.description: Classic skull and crossbones arrangement with a lit cigar and dark smoke trails against black.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Gold Chain Recline
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a hooded sweatshirt with a thick gold chain, smoking and gesturing.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Elegance
images.description: A sophisticated skeleton in a pinstripe suit and fedora with glowing green eyes and mystical smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Fedora Intensity
images.description: An intense skeleton wearing both hoodie and fedora, surrounded by swirling smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Vertical Stance
images.description: A standing skeleton in a torn hoodie with gold chain, holding a cigar and making a hand gesture.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Chill Mode
images.description: A laid-back skeleton in a hoodie with silver chain, reclining with cigar and attitude.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Lounger
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a full pinstripe suit and fedora, reclining with cigar and hand on hat.

images.title: Leather Jacket Skeleton: Fedora Cool
images.description: A rugged skeleton in a leather jacket and fedora with red eyes, reclining with cigar.

images.title: Grim Reaper: Hooded Lounger
images.description: A skeleton in dark hooded robes, reclining with cigar and glowing red eyes.

images.title: Leather Jacket Skeleton: Fedora Attitude
images.description: A skeleton in a brown leather trench coat and fedora, one gold tooth visible, smoking with style.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Relax
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a pinstripe suit and fedora, reclining with legs crossed and cigar.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Toxic Green
images.description: A skeleton in a torn hoodie with skull pendant gold chain, exhaling thick green smoke.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Red Accent
images.description: A stylish skeleton in a black suit with red shirt and fedora, reclining with cigar and smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Monochrome Edge
images.description: A stark black and white skeleton in a hoodie and jeans, smoking with clean line art style.

images.title: Bare Skeleton: Classic Recline
images.description: A pure skeleton without clothing, reclining in classic pose with cigar and attitude.

title: Dark Sorceress Collection
description: A striking series of 15 dark fantasy illustrations featuring powerful sorceresses, witches, and shadowy enchantresses surrounded by thorns, moons, ravens, skulls, and arcane energy in a hauntingly atmospheric black aesthetic.

images.title: Witch of the Thorn Circle
images.description: A dark witch in a pointed hat channels swirling purple energy from both hands, standing within a glowing green thorn circle beneath a crescent moon, flanked by dead trees and hanging chains.

images.title: Shadow Demon Queen
images.description: A monstrous dark queen with writhing tentacle hair, glowing red eyes and a sinister grin rises against a crimson and purple backdrop, flanked by blood moons, bats, and grasping clawed hands.

images.title: Red-Eyed Sorceress of the Dark Moon
images.description: A pale sorceress with glowing red star-marked eyes and flowing black hair raises her clawed hands against a background of twisted trees and a crescent moon with a sleeping face.

images.title: Moonlit Witch with Red Eyes
images.description: A menacing witch in a tall decorated hat with glowing red eyes spreads her claw-like hands before a glowing full moon, surrounded by bats, crescent moons, stars, and bare skeletal trees.

images.title: Paper-Cut Witch with Staff
images.description: A paper-cut style dark witch wielding a gnarled staff and glowing red eyes stands before a crimson circle, surrounded by layered black cutout symbols including pentacles, moons, and arcane glyphs.

images.title: Dark Fairy of the Skull Grove
images.description: A graceful dark enchantress with ornate feathered crown and swirling fairy-like wings drifts among skulls and bats, her long clawed hand reaching downward in an eerie black-and-white composition.

images.title: Sorceress of the Swirling Night
images.description: A hauntingly beautiful sorceress with cracked face markings and wild flowing hair stands amid layered swirling dark energy, bats, and bare branches under a crescent moon in a paper-cut style.

images.title: Witch Beneath the Blood-Sparked Moon
images.description: A witch in a wide-brimmed hat raises her hands in a dark forest, red glowing sparks and floating eyes surrounding her as a massive full moon illuminates bats and twisted branches overhead.

images.title: Witch of the Evil Moons
images.description: A pale witch with glowing red eyes in a tall hat walks amid swirling thorned vines, skeleton hands, snarling crescent moon faces, and red-eyed bats in a dramatic paper-cut dark fantasy style.

images.title: Rune Sorceress and the Ravens
images.description: A ghostly sorceress with wild white hair and skeleton hands channels swirling energy within a rune-inscribed circle, surrounded by four red-eyed ravens and coiling thorned vines.

images.title: Shadow Queen of Wolves and Bats
images.description: A dark silhouetted queen with glowing eyes commands wolves, bats, and grasping shadow hands within a richly layered deep crimson and purple night scene framed by swirling ornamental borders.

images.title: Dark Queen of Skulls and Roses
images.description: A dramatic dark queen with antler-like raised arms, star eye markings, and an elaborate feathered gown stands amid skulls, dark roses, and bats under a sinister grinning moon.

images.title: Witch of the Skull Vines
images.description: A witch with a bent hat and flowing hair conjures floating skulls from swirling thorned vines with both hands, surrounded by bats and spiraling dark tendrils in a black-and-white illustration.

images.title: White-Haired Sorceress and Shadow Spirits
images.description: A striking sorceress with flowing white hair and a jagged feathered gown channels faint energy from both hands, surrounded by lurking shadow creatures with glowing eyes in a dark swirling background.

images.title: Witch of the Watching Forest
images.description: A solitary witch in a buckled hat carries a spiraling staff through a dark forest, her long hair swept by wind while glowing brown eyes peer from the branches and shadows around her.

title: Skeleton Card Collection
description: A striking series of 20 dark fantasy card illustrations featuring skeleton sorcerers, armored bone warriors, and cloaked undead figures channeling arcane energy, wielding glowing staves, and commanding swirling dark forces across ornate card frames.

images.title: Skeleton Mage with Purple Orb and Rune Circle
images.description: A robed skeleton with glowing red eyes holds a swirling purple energy orb in one hand and a spiked arcane staff in the other, surrounded by a glowing rune circle and smoke wisps on a dark ornate card numbered II.

images.title: Armored Skull Warrior — Card XIII Death
images.description: A heavily armored skull-faced warrior in dark plate mail charges a swirling purple energy ball in one gauntleted hand while gripping a staff topped with a glowing skull, framed by a thorn-bordered card labeled Death XIII.

images.title: Skeleton Channeler with Green and Purple Energy
images.description: A bare-ribbed skeleton in a dark cloak with spiked pauldrons channels green and purple glowing orbs, surrounded by floating arcane sigils and a glowing green chest emblem on a dark card marked A and II.

images.title: Hooded Skeleton — Death Card XIII
images.description: A hooded skeleton with glowing purple eyes clutches a swirling purple energy mass in ringed bony fingers, seated against a dark starfield on an ornately bordered card labeled Death XIII with skull corner accents.

images.title: Hooded Skeleton with Blue Arcane Orb — Card 10
images.description: A hooded skeleton with glowing blue eyes cradles a blazing blue energy orb between both skeletal hands, surrounded by floating arcane circle glyphs on a detailed dark card numbered 10.

images.title: Skeleton in Spiked Armor — Card XI
images.description: A dynamic skeleton in jagged spiked armor poses with three floating white arcane circles in its bony hands against billowing dark smoke on a minimalist ornate card numbered XI, labeled Inord Parwe.

images.title: Crowned Skeleton with Purple Vortex and Skulls
images.description: A spiked-crown skeleton in a layered dark robe raises one hand with a swirling purple vortex and the other clutching a cluster of floating skulls, with crescent moons and star symbols glowing overhead.

images.title: The Necromancer — Card XIII
images.description: A hooded skeleton necromancer with dark hollow eyes holds a glowing orb-tipped staff, encircled by a glowing blue rune ring halo and floating arcane marks on a gothic card titled The Necromancer, numbered XIII.

images.title: The Necromancer with Crystal Staff and Lightning
images.description: A purple-eyed skeleton necromancer in dark armor charges a crackling purple lightning vortex in one hand while raising a staff topped with glowing purple crystals, set against swirling dark energy on a card titled The Necromancer.

images.title: The Necromancer — Dark Orb Close-Up, Card XIII
images.description: A hooded skeleton with glowing purple eyes cradles a dark exploding energy orb in both hands, surrounded by swirling purple smoke and red embers on a skull-cornered card labeled The Necromancer, numbered XIII.

images.title: Winged Skeleton with Ravens and Crescent Moons
images.description: A winged skeleton in a dark feathered cloak holds a glowing staff and a swirling white energy orb, flanked by black ravens and triple crescent moons, surrounded by spiral smoke and arcane circle markings.

images.title: The Shadow Binder — Card XIV
images.description: A robed skeleton in a dark hood grips a flaming purple-tipped staff while wisps of purple smoke coil around its figure on an ornate gold-bordered card labeled The Shadow Binder, numbered III and XIV.

images.title: Shadow Mage with Antler Crown
images.description: A skeleton in a dark hooded cloak and jagged antler crown grips a tall twisted staff topped with a swirling purple and green flame, surrounded by flowing purple smoke and an arcane glyph ring backdrop, labeled Shadow Mage.

images.title: Shadow Sentry — Card III
images.description: A bare skeleton leaps dynamically with two hands channeling swirling blue-green energy orbs, wrapped in spiraling blue light streams on a dark detailed card labeled Shadow Sentry, numbered III.

images.title: The Shadow Servant — Card XV
images.description: A hooded skeleton with glowing red eyes sprints forward while channeling two swirling purple energy orbs in its outstretched clawed hands, trailing dark purple smoke on an ornate card labeled The Shadow Servant, numbered XV.

images.title: Shadow Weaver — Card II
images.description: A bare skeleton with arcane markings etched on its skull dances within a floating ring of dark sigil medallions, holding a glowing orb in one hand while dark smoke billows around it on a gold-bordered card labeled Shadow Weaver, numbered II.

images.title: The Shadow Wielder — Armored with Scythe, Card XIII
images.description: A fully armored skeleton with a spiked dark crown wields a glowing purple scythe blade in one hand while projecting purple arcane sigils and a crescent from the other, on a card labeled The Shadow Wielder, numbered XIII.

images.title: The Shadow Wielder — Crystal Staff, Card XI
images.description: A hooded skeleton in dark armor grips a tall staff topped with a glowing purple crystal while channeling purple flame energy in the other hand, surrounded by swirling purple smoke on a card labeled The Shadow Wielder, numbered XI.

images.title: The Shadow Wielder — Vortex Portal, Card XIII
images.description: An armored skeleton with exposed ribs charges a dark purple energy mass in one hand and holds a purple crystal-tipped staff in the other, standing before a swirling green and purple vortex portal on a card labeled The Shadow Wielder, numbered XIII.

images.title: The Shadow — Scythe Bearer, Card XIII
images.description: A skeletal figure adorned with arcane coin medallions and a rune-marked skull wields a large scythe over one shoulder while projecting a swirling dark purple energy orb from the other hand, wrapped in dark smoke on a card labeled The Shadow, numbered XIII.

title: Incognito Mode Collection
description: A bold series of 20 dark humor illustrations featuring shadowy figures, skulls, and cloaked characters themed around incognito browsing, secrecy, and digital anonymity with eerie typography and glowing eyes.

images.title: Incognito Mode — Green-Eyed Shadow Figure
images.description: A shadowy cloaked figure with glowing green eyes and a fedora hat centered against a dark purple-tinted background, with the text 'Incognito Mode — What Happens in the Shadows... (Or Does It?)'

images.title: Stay Hidden — Hooded Creature with Lantern
images.description: A small chibi-style hooded creature with glowing yellow eyes holds a flickering lantern against a dark background, with the text 'Stay Hidden — Incognito Mode — Darkness Requires Secrecy'.

images.title: Incognito Mode: Engaged — Spy with Flashlight
images.description: A cute cartoon spy in a fedora and trench coat shines a flashlight revealing small ghosts on a dark patterned background with spider webs and eyes, with the text 'Incognito Mode: Engaged. They'll never know... or will they?'

images.title: Incognito Mode — Skull Peeking Through Triangle
images.description: A grinning skull wearing a dark fedora peeks out from a cracked triangular dark panel against a black background, with the bold white text 'Incognito Mode' beside it.

images.title: Going Dark — Skull with Fedora and Sunglasses
images.description: A glowing white skull wearing a dark fedora and black sunglasses floats against a near-black background with soft white glow, with the text 'Going Dark. Incognito Mode Active.'

images.title: Incognito Can't Save You — Darkness Is Watching
images.description: A hooded skull figure with glowing red eyes crouches in the lower corner of a cracked dark stone wall, with large red glowing text reading 'Incognito Can't Save You — Darkness Is Watching You.'

images.title: Incognito — Skull Phantom with Red Eyes
images.description: A skull-faced phantom in a wide fedora and round red-glowing glasses emerges from swirling dark smoke and cracks against a grungy dark background, with large weathered text reading 'Incognito — Your Secret Browsing... The Darkness Watches.'

images.title: The Darkness Is Browsing With You
images.description: A cracked stone fedora and dark glasses with glowing red eyes float above wisps of dark smoke on a pure black background, with the text 'The Darkness Is Browsing With You — Incognito mode doesn't hide everything.'

images.title: Shhh I'm Incognito — Skull Peeking Around Wall
images.description: A cartoon skull in a fedora and dark sunglasses peeks around a cracked brick wall corner with a knowing grin, with the text 'Shhh... I'm Incognito. (Don't Tell The Living).'

images.title: Incognito Mode — Skull Shushing at the Door
images.description: A green-tinted skull in a fedora and dark coat presses a bony finger to its mouth in a shushing gesture while gripping a dark doorframe, with the caption 'Shhh... The Ghosts Are Watching' and large handwritten 'incognito mode' text below.

images.title: Incognito Mode Shield — Skeleton Stay Hidden
images.description: A cartoon skeleton in a hoodie stands beside a glowing purple shield badge displaying 'Incognito Mode' with a crossed-eye icon and the text 'Shh... Skeleton's Watching. (But You're Not)', with 'Stay Hidden.' in orange below.

images.title: Shhh I Am Incognito — Skeleton Peeking Through Crack
images.description: A glowing white cartoon skeleton peeks around a cracked stone wall with a finger to its teeth in a hushing pose, with the text 'Shhh I Am Incognito. Don't Tell Anyone That I Am Here.'

images.title: Incognito — Skeleton with App Icon, You Can't Hide
images.description: A detailed skeleton in a dark fedora and coat peers over a rounded square incognito app icon while holding its face with skeletal hands, with the text 'Incognito — You Can Run, But You Can't Hide'.

images.title: You Are Not Alone in the Dark — Hat and Skull Glasses
images.description: A minimalist dark illustration showing a floating fedora above faceless dark sunglasses with skull reflections and a wispy tail, on a near-black background with the subtle text 'You Are Not Alone In The Dark'.

images.title: You Are Now Incognito — No One Is Safe
images.description: A stark minimal white skull icon with a wide fedora, fanged mouth, and glowing red eyes displayed against a near-black background with bold text reading 'You Are Now Incognito. No One Is Safe.'

images.title: You Are Not Safe — Red-Eyed Incognito Figure
images.description: A shadowy figure in a dark trench coat and fedora with glowing red circular glasses is displayed within a rounded app-style icon frame against a black background, with the text 'You Are Not Safe' below.

images.title: Incognito Mode — Ghost, No One Can Hear Your Screams
images.description: A soft translucent floating ghost shape with two glowing red dot eyes hovers against a dark gray gradient background, with the text 'You are now in Incognito Mode — No one can hear your screams'.

images.title: You Are Incognito — Neon Hat Skull Shushing
images.description: A photorealistic skull wearing a wide-brimmed black fedora and a dark trench coat presses a bony finger to its lips in a shushing gesture, with a glowing neon incognito icon outline above, and the text 'You Are Incognito' in dripping horror font below.

images.title: Incognito — Skull Peeking Beside App Screen
images.description: A red-eyed skull in a dark fedora and trench coat peers around the left edge of a dark screen mockup displaying a skull icon, the word 'incognito', and the message 'You're incognito now.' in a browser-style layout.

images.title: You Are Now Incognito — Red Glow Suit Figure
images.description: The minimalist silhouetted figure in a suit and fedora with white goggle-like eyes glows with a subtle red aura against a dark background, with the text 'You are now incognito — None of your browsing history will be saved'.
